signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & Alpenglow Upgrade Progress | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 14, 2026, Solana reached an all-time record of **167 million monthly token holders** with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million.[2] The **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** is progressing, aiming to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds.
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 22, 2:30PM-2:35PM ET
Will the price of Solana be above $90 on April 28?

signals.headline: Based on the search results provided, here are the key developments:

signals.headline: Solana Vastly Outpaces Ethereum in Transaction Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Vastly Outpaces Ethereum in Transaction Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana processed **25.3 billion transactions in Q1 2026** compared to Ethereum's **200 million**—a 125x difference.[3] This is attributed to new developer influx and booming stablecoin volume, representing a shift in developer momentum.[3]
